steps.title: Set up the perimeter equation
steps.content:
The perimeter of a triangle is the sum of all three sides. With the given information:

$$x + y + z = 22$$

Substitute $x = 9$ and $y = 7$:

$$9 + 7 + z = 22$$

$$16 + z = 22$$

steps.title: Solve for z
steps.content: Subtract 16 from both sides: $$z = 22 - 16 = 6$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
